prompt: Tap flop right for base ICM pressure input.
why_v1: Board anchor keeps street context stable before ICM action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. flop_right is the board anchor, so the tournament read completes the flop texture before the pressure line moves on.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Use the flop anchor first because it sets the original board texture, which is the base for whether tournament pressure should stay controlled or grow.
